programme.desc: A diamond theft on a cruise ship owned by Jonathan leads the Harts to join the cruise ship to catch the thief

programme.desc: When a series of arsons all seem to benefit the same company Cagney and Lacey uncover an extortion operation

programme.desc: An arrogant pilot designs a newer version of Airwolf and plans to engage Hawke in an air-to-air duel to determine which of the two is the better pilot

programme.desc: Gilligan believes he has become an old man after his hair turns completely white overnight but The Professors solution only makes things worse when his hair completely falls out

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Lovely young invalid Meg Kinderly has to fend for herself after she gets trapped in her spacious family mansion with a vicious killer who has just wiped out most of her family and all of the servants But things arent that simple

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Reverend Nolan Powers is a fire and brimstone evangelist who has achieved tremendous fame wealth and power from his radio program thats broadcast on a national basis from his station WGOD A team of TV journalists do a story on Powers and his increasing popularity with the masses However a long-suppressed shameful secret from his dark family past threatens to destroy Powers and his current high profile status

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While working as a grounds keeper on a large estate owned by a kindly old lady she is brutally murdered in her own home Both her granddaughter and granddaughters husband implicate Eric But Eric knows he didnt do it and knows who did

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric is kidnapped by a corrupt Southern politician who is dying of cancer and wants Eric to cure him and make him immortal by turning him into a werewolf

programme.title: Knight 303
programme.desc: Knight 303

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed writes and sings a song that is destined to become a hit record Of course Wilbur must pretend that its all him and not Ed

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Sergeant Schultz impersonates Klink in a scheme to get some of his men free from the Gestapo

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: To get an Italian officer to defect the Heroes use pizza to tempt him

programme.title: Mchale 324
programme.desc: Mchale 324

programme.title: Mchale 411
programme.desc: Mchale 411

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carters platoon takes part in war games and Gomers naive ways cause more problems than Sgt Carter can handle Will Gomers actions get Carter the boot

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer and his fellow Marines are headed into town on day passes when one of them is stuck on guard duty Gomer volunteers to help his buddys wife take care of things for the baby - but Sgt Carter volunteers to drive them around leaving his date on hold

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan moves to the other side of the island when the other castaways suddenly become allergic to him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan finds sunflower seeds on the island that gives him the ability to read minds and when the fellow castaways find out they want in on the action

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa and Luke attempt to build a rowboat

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After Amos mocks Georges painting cheap junk dealer Daggett pays twenty dollars for a painting by George at the McCoy farm so Amos encourages Georges painting to be his manager unaware that Daggett has actually paid for the frame

programme.title: Smart 412
programme.desc: Smart 412

programme.title: Smart 505
programme.desc: Smart 505

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: What happens when BJ and the Bear transport a circus veteran his granddaughter and their trained elephant through the turf of Wiley and the Fox

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol brings a French Poodle home from the pound and Mister Ed plans to get rid of Pierre as soon as possible

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac worries that young Stephanie on probation working in the gift shop is stealing jewelry Henpecked Fred feels his girlfriend Christine is pressuring him into marriage before hes ready Widower Woody and son Alan both fall for Libby

programme.title: WKRP 115
programme.desc: WKRP 115

programme.title: WKRP 112
programme.desc: WKRP 112

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood throws his back out the night before hes set to bowl against an old rival

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: The Newtons try to throw the perfect birthday party for Will

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Daredevil Shara Stanleys drunken mechanic Bill Woods tries to talk her out of a dangerous stunt because her beneficiaries plan to sabotage it and have her killed so they can collect on her insurance

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: After witnessing a murder Jonathan hits his head and loses his memory As he tries to recover his memory he starts to suspect he may have had a mistress -- and killed her

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick and Joanna play marriage counselors when the flaky wife of a senator leaves her husband and comes to the Stratford

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Kirk has a date with Leslie Dick decides he wants to go skiing but since he doesnt know how to ski he gets Leslie to go since shes an Olympic skiing hopeful One thing leads to another and she winds up with a knee injury that will probably end her dreams Kirk and all of Leslies school friends wind up angry with Dick

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A crate containing a lion bound for a zoo washes up on the island But while the other castaways are scared for their lives the lion immediately makes a bond with Gilligan

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: A deranged man named Garth Youngblood takes a fancy to Baywatch lifeguard Caroline Holden and makes many advances toward her When Caroline resists Garth captures her and locks her in a cage furnished like her apartment while Mitch teams with fellow Baywatch lifeguards Newman and Barnett to help him and Garner look for Caroline

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When one of Dr Arcanes experiments is inexplicably ruined Graham suspects poltergeists Arcane swiftly discovers the spirit of General Sunderland is haunting the swamp and has plans for revenge

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans find themselves caught up in a long-running war between two rival planets Betha and Delta When a Bethan gunship which has landed on the moon as a tactical advantage appears to have been hit its commander Dione seeks sanctuary with the Alphans Koenig attempts to negotiate a truce but Dione has other ideas

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Hercules 218
programme.desc: Hercules 218

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Zoor agrees to do a live television interview to try to endear himself to humans but the shows producer has an ulterior motive in getting him in front of a camera

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens develop a new drug made from human brain tissue planning to use it to control human society

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcanes sonic experiment designed to kill Alec cross-fires and turns him into his opposite - a kind generous considerate man horrified at his treatment of Alec However if he can stop the experiment it may change him b

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are asked by a woman from Oregon to try to find her niece who has run away from home Their search eventually leads them into the world of pornography and they soon become involved in the arrest of a pornographer who may have info on where she might be located

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The Fugitive

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: When a sunken Barkley riverboat is finally found its cargo of gold is missing and the late family patriarch is suspected to have stolen it

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: His gear stolen Cheyenne follows the thief and killer to a small town The outlaw has stopped there to see the sheriff - his father The sheriff resigns so Cheyenne takes the job and falls for a girl whos father was the sheriff

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An undercover cop is murdered with Mike Stones gun and a hotshot young inspector seems determined to pin the rap on Stone

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A cocky sleazy and horny late night talk radio host brings in a sexy female guest who claims the aliens gave her the solution to evil in the world - a monster that eats bad people who agree to it He laughs it off at first

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate abuse to babies One mother claims her child fell down the stairs but they find the father beat the child The baby dies The parents never wanted the child

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 24 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Andy Jack v. Dillon Adam.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Smith v. Gareth Millar

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.desc: Wisniewski’s development as a fighter was a family affair, as he and his brother watched tapes of MMA battles then trained in the front yard. Oganov honed his skills in Serbia, while enrolled in the Red Army.
